sql_fixture.redacted_sql: INSERT INTO tickets (id, tenant_id, project_id, slug, title, status, priority, created_by_actor_id, metadata) VALUES (:target_ticket_id, :target_tenant_id, :target_project_id, :target_slug, :target_title, 'open', 'medium', :target_actor_id, '{"rls_ready": true}'::jsonb)

assertions.name: approval_request_tenant_binding_must_match
assertions.expected: Research-to-Ticket promotion rejects approval_request_id values that are not bound to the same tenant context.

assertions.name: ticket_creation_does_not_escape_boundary
assertions.expected: No ticket, relation, or research_to_ticket audit event should be created when approval binding fails.

assertions.name: approval_four_integrity_remains_authoritative
assertions.expected: The case preserves Approval 4 integrity by treating approval_request_id as server-trusted binding evidence.
